title: Frequently asked questions
subtitle: Answers to your most common questions.
pageSubtitle: Quickly find answers to your most common questions

faqs.question: Do candidates pay anything?
faqs.answer: No. Candidate registration is completely free. Our priority is to help you find the right job.

faqs.question: Is a CV required?
faqs.answer: No. Our profile is designed to showcase your skills without a CV. You can add one if you wish.

faqs.question: How is my data protected?
faqs.answer: Recruiter access is strictly verified, confidential data is protected. We never share your information.

faqs.question: What types of profiles are you looking for?
faqs.answer: Customer support, sales, customer service, back-office... All call center professions.

faqs.question: How do recruiters contact me?
faqs.answer: Through the platform. You receive a notification and choose whether to follow up.

faqs.question: Can I edit my profile?
faqs.answer: Yes, at any time, directly in your candidate space.
